design_validity_audit.interpretation: A pass means each frozen hidden target is publicly manipulable, covered by the Gate A recipes, observable before termination, instantiable, and absent from the mechanism-Agent prompt. It does not establish identifiability.

checks.detail: Every frozen recipe must contain a public measurement before termination.
The no-change twin must have no hidden intervention.
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.

At least one public control implicated by the hidden law must vary across frozen recipes; varied=[{'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'potential_V'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'current_mA'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'electrolyte_profile'}].
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.
Supported material targets are ['catalyst', 'electrolyte_profile', 'solvent'].
add_solvent.solvent must be available to the Agent in electrochemical-conversion.
A relational counterfactual needs at least two public choices; choices=[0, 1, 2, 3].
All moved public indices must be legal; moved=[0, 2], choices=[0, 1, 2, 3].
Frozen Gate A recipes must exercise every moved index; moved=[0, 2], covered=[0, 1, 2, 3].
primary=selective_product_yield; median_max_effect=0.030641; median_old_policy_regret=0.008834; optimal_action_change_rate=1.000; thresholds=(0.010000, 0.005000, 0.500).

interpretation: The primary checkpoint establishes controlled identifiability from an online-history-aligned matched pre/post public recipe budget. Larger checkpoints are diagnostic curves with equally sized matched reference sets; they do not establish online-policy-feasible mechanism discovery. Full Gate A requires a separately bound online-policy-feasible certificate.

paired_phase_design.budget_interpretation: The primary budget uses the protocol-available pre-change history. Larger checkpoints use k matched pre-change references and k post-change diagnostics and are non-controlling diagnostic curves.

public_feature_contract.active_action_source: prior expected information over the frozen two-recipe batches
public_feature_contract.encoding: post-minus-pre contrasts over sorted flattened finite-masked public values
public_feature_contract.fixed_trajectory_action_source: first two actions in the frozen deterministic action library
public_feature_contract.source: agent-visible numeric observation and reward after every compiled public recipe operation in matched pre-change and post-change phases
